ddls:
CREATE TABLE "visitors" (
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the visitor */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information (e.g., browser, device) */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date and time the visitor entered the website */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geographical location of the visitor */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the visitor */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of referral (e.g., Google, social media) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "is_returning_visitor" INTEGER /* Indicates if the visitor has visited before */,
  "marketing_channel" TEXT /* Marketing channel used to attract the visitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor who supplies the product */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is featured */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the product information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the category in the frontend */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the category information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor who interacted with the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, click, add-to-cart, purchase) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the interaction */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the interaction */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of referral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor who viewed the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the view */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the view */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of referral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clicks" (
  "click_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor who clicked on the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product clicked on */,
  "click_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the click */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the click in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the click */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of referral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("click_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "add_to_carts" (
  "atc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each add-to-cart */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor who added the product to their cart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product added to cart */,
  "atc_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the add-to-cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product added to cart */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the add-to-cart */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of referral */,
  "cart_value" TEXT /* Total value of the cart at the time of add-to-cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_add_to_carts_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_add_to_carts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the purchase */,
  "purchase_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the purchase */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of referral */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the purchase */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the purchase */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Order status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view report, edit data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
